heading: Amendment, extension, or increase of commitment amounts
label: 1734 Amendment, extension, or increase of commitment amounts
text: At any time prior to final endorsement for insurance, the Secretary, in his discretion, may amend, extend, or increase the amount of any commitment, provided the mortgage, as finally endorsed for insurance is eligible for insurance under the provisions of this chapter and the rules and regulations thereunder, in effect at the time the original commitment to insure was issued.
notes: Amendments1984— struck out “; mortgage conditions” after “amounts” in section catchline.Pub. L. 98–4791967— substituted “Secretary” for “Commissioner”.Pub. L. 90–19
amendments: Amendments1984— struck out “; mortgage conditions” after “amounts” in section catchline.Pub. L. 98–4791967— substituted “Secretary” for “Commissioner”.Pub. L. 90–19
